name: Chicken Escarole Soup
recipeIngredient: 3 to 4 lbs chicken necks, wings, and backs
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients for the chicken stock in a large pot.
2. Bring to a simmer over medium heat and cook for 2 hours and 30 minutes.
3. Strain the stock through a fine cheesecloth into a clean bowl, discarding solids.
4. Wash one head of escarole well and chop coarsely.
5. In another large pot, bring the strained broth to a simmer over medium heat.
6. Add the chopped escarole and cook for 15 minutes.
7. Serve hot with grated cheese on top.
